prompt: 회사에서 갑자기 물류 SCM 시스템 기획을 맡게 됐는데 이 분야를 전혀 몰라서 전문가랑 대화할 수가 없습니다

assertions.name: has-domain-landscape
assertions.description: Output contains 'Domain Landscape' with 5-7 SCM/logistics areas

assertions.name: has-priority-map
assertions.description: Output contains 'Learning Priority Map' prioritizing for system planning context

assertions.name: strategic-focus
assertions.description: Priority reflects strategic oversight need — what to learn for evaluating vendors, defining requirements, talking to specialists

assertions.name: output-in-korean
assertions.description: Orient map is written in Korean

assertions.name: scm-breadth
assertions.description: Domain landscape covers SCM breadth: demand forecasting, inventory, warehousing, logistics, procurement, technology stack
